description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named rdsn Unit Test that runs on every pull request to specific files and branches, and allows manual triggering. The workflow has four ubuntu-latest jobs that run in a Docker container with specific environment and volume settings. Each job checks out the repository, filters for changes in third-party files, and then either unpacks prebuilt third-parties or rebuilds them. The jobs then compile and run unit tests with different sanitizer settings.
